issues.problem: Tagged `[UNVERIFIED] (Tier 4 — inferred)` but SP clearly shows `GETDATE()` in the INSERT. Sibling wiki Dealing_CEPWeeklyAudit_Rules marks the identical pattern as confirmed `(Tier 4 — SP_W_CEPWeeklyAudit)` without [UNVERIFIED].

No NULL-rate or placeholder-row proportion documented despite no-change rows being a central gotcha. Approximate ratio would help analysts gauge filtering impact.
Description says 'Hedge server of the parent rule context' but does not trace the alias: column originates as `HedgeRuleActionTypeID` from Rules staging via `#Dim_CPtoRule`.
